name: scd41_driver

_comments.chips: 该包支持运行的芯片型号，all表示无芯片限制
_comments.fw: 该包依赖的特定固件如ulab、lvgl,all表示无固件依赖

description: A MicroPython driver for the Sensirion SCD4X CO2/temperature/humidity sensor, supporting periodic measurement, low-power mode, forced calibration, self-test and EEPROM persistence
author: ladyada, peter-l5
